positive: An aesthetically pleasing, minimalist circular crest featuring a stylized, vibrant celestial arrangement: a glowing crescent moon cradling a scattering of nebulous, pastel-colored planets and geometric stars. The composition should be highly symmetrical, set against a deep indigo void. Incorporate intricate, clean line work reminiscent of Art Deco scientific diagrams, suggesting cosmic mystery and elegant exploration. The style must be a fusion of ethereal bioluminescence and crisp, vector-art linework, suitable for screen printing on textiles. The palette emphasizes sapphire blues, muted lavender, gold leaf accents, and pure white highlights. High contrast, clean silhouettes, central focus, graphic design quality, scalable vector art look, UHD.
